text.tspan: SOX: Governance committee review and advisory board approval constitute mandatory financial control checkpoints. Decision
documentation (4.5) is an immutable audit artifact required for SOX compliance.

text.tspan: OCC 2023-17: Third-party governance review must document risk tier rationale, reviewer authority, and approval
conditions. Risk-tiered routing (4.2) ensures proportionate oversight per vendor criticality.

text.tspan: EU AI Act + SR 11-7: Ethical Impact Assessment (4.4) is mandatory for AI/model systems classified as High or Critical
risk. Ethics Committee review documents model risk acceptance and AI Act conformity assessment.
